tasks.title: Build REST API Endpoint
tasks.description: Create a CRUD REST API for the user management module using Node.js and Express.

tasks.title: UI Component Library
tasks.description: Design and implement reusable React components following the design system guidelines.

tasks.description: Achieve 80% code coverage by writing unit tests for all core modules using Jest.

weeklyGoal: Ship the MVP authentication system and user dashboard by end of sprint.
